---
title: "Phase 1: Environment & Setup"
description: "Docker container with Bioconductor, Python, and all dependencies. 
  Reproducible computational environment for the full pipeline."
image: docker-diagram.png
---

## Overview

Built a containerized environment using Docker with R 4.4, Python 3.11, and 
all required packages for multi-omics analysis.

## Key Components

- **Docker image**: Bioconductor base + DESeq2, MOFA2, mixOmics, Signac
- **Python environment**: xgboost, shap, torch, scanpy
- **Data pipeline**: Download scripts for SMRI and GEO data
- **Version control**: All configurations tracked in bioinformatics-2026 repo

## Deliverables

- [Dockerfile](https://github.com/codymgeoffroy/bioinformatics-2026/tree/main/projects/psychpgx/docker)
- [Environment YAML](https://github.com/codymgeoffroy/bioinformatics-2026/blob/main/config/environment.yml)
- Reproducibility: `docker build -t psychpgx .`

## Methods

[Brief technical description of setup decisions]

## Results

[Screenshot of successful environment build, test output]
